feed.title: Bitcoin Pattern
feed.subtitle: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, and SOL technical analysis every 3 hours. Cross-exchange OKX & Binance quotes, chart patterns, and AI-assisted market reads.

entry.title: Cross-Asset Crypto Gains: BNB Leads as BTC Holds $77,329 — Five-Asset Technical Review

link.title: Cross-Asset Crypto Gains: BNB Leads as BTC Holds $77,329 — Five-Asset Technical Review

entry.content:
Generated (UTC): 2026-05-25 13:14 UTC

Reference prices: BTC $77,329 · ETH $2,116 · XRP $1.3565 · BNB $670.47 · SOL $85.90

Volatility: BTC low (+0.36%) · ETH low (-0.15%) · XRP low (-0.44%) · BNB medium (+1.53%) · SOL low (-0.56%)

The major crypto complex is trading with mixed momentum across BTC, large-cap alts, and exchange tokens. Cross-exchange OKX and Binance quotes show the blended spot picture below.

Bitcoin: Spot Technical Read

Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) is quoted near $77,329, showing low 24h volatility (+0.36%). OKX $77,330.10 · Binance $77,327.20. Watch whether price holds intraday support or tests the lower 24h band.

Ethereum: Spot Technical Read

Ethereum (ETH/USDT) is quoted near $2,116, showing low 24h volatility (-0.15%). OKX $2,115.70 · Binance $2,115.69. Watch whether price holds intraday support or tests the lower 24h band.

XRP: Spot Technical Read

XRP (XRP/USDT) is quoted near $1.3565, showing low 24h volatility (-0.44%). OKX $1.36 · Binance $1.36. Watch whether price holds intraday support or tests the lower 24h band.

BNB: Spot Technical Read

BNB (BNB/USDT) is quoted near $670.47, showing medium 24h volatility (+1.53%). OKX $670.50 · Binance $670.44. Watch whether price holds intraday support or tests the lower 24h band.

Solana: Spot Technical Read

Solana (SOL/USDT) is quoted near $85.90, showing low 24h volatility (-0.56%). OKX $85.89 · Binance $85.90. Watch whether price holds intraday support or tests the lower 24h band.

Cross-Asset Synthesis and Risk Observations

Leadership between Bitcoin and altcoins should be tracked via relative strength — when ETH, SOL, and BNB outperform BTC, risk appetite tends to expand; underperformance suggests defensive positioning. Compare OKX and Binance prints when dispersion widens.

Monitoring the Crypto Landscape

Download the Bitcoin Pattern app on the App Store for live BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, and SOL charts with AI pattern recognition.

About Bitcoin Pattern

Bitcoin Pattern is an iOS app for crypto technical analysis — live multi-asset quotes, AI-assisted chart patterns, and multi-timeframe charts.

  • App Store: Search “Bitcoin Pattern” or visit Bitcoin Pattern.
  • Features: Pattern recognition, B/S signals, 24 indicators, dark mode.

Disclaimer: AI-assisted content for informational purposes only. Not investment advice.

entry.title: Cross-Asset Crypto Gains: BNB Leads as BTC Holds $77,390 — Five-Asset Technical Review

link.title: Cross-Asset Crypto Gains: BNB Leads as BTC Holds $77,390 — Five-Asset Technical Review

entry.content:
Generated (UTC): 2026-05-25 12:58 UTC

Reference prices: BTC $77,390 · ETH $2,118 · XRP $1.3582 · BNB $670.16 · SOL $85.91

Volatility: BTC low (+0.34%) · ETH low (-0.11%) · XRP low (-0.44%) · BNB medium (+1.54%) · SOL low (-0.53%)

The major crypto complex is trading with mixed momentum across BTC, large-cap alts, and exchange tokens. Cross-exchange OKX and Binance quotes show the blended spot picture below.

BTC — Bitcoin

Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) is quoted near $77,390, with a low 24h volatility profile (+0.34%). OKX: $77,391.80 · Binance: $77,388.17 at snapshot time. Monitor whether price holds above intraday support or fades toward the lower 24h band.

ETH — Ethereum

Ethereum (ETH/USDT) is quoted near $2,118, with a low 24h volatility profile (-0.11%). OKX: $2,117.65 · Binance: $2,117.70 at snapshot time. Monitor whether price holds above intraday support or fades toward the lower 24h band.

XRP — XRP

XRP (XRP/USDT) is quoted near $1.3582, with a low 24h volatility profile (-0.44%). OKX: $1.36 · Binance: $1.36 at snapshot time. Monitor whether price holds above intraday support or fades toward the lower 24h band.

BNB — BNB

BNB (BNB/USDT) is quoted near $670.16, with a medium 24h volatility profile (+1.54%). OKX: $670.10 · Binance: $670.22 at snapshot time. Monitor whether price holds above intraday support or fades toward the lower 24h band.

SOL — Solana

Solana (SOL/USDT) is quoted near $85.91, with a low 24h volatility profile (-0.53%). OKX: $85.92 · Binance: $85.91 at snapshot time. Monitor whether price holds above intraday support or fades toward the lower 24h band.

Cross-Asset Synthesis

Leadership between Bitcoin and altcoins should be tracked via relative strength — when ETH, SOL, and BNB outperform BTC, risk appetite tends to expand; underperformance suggests defensive positioning.

Risk Observations

Crypto spot markets remain sensitive to liquidity pockets and exchange-specific flows. Compare OKX and Binance prints when dispersion widens.

Monitoring the Crypto Landscape

For live multi-asset charts and pattern recognition, see the Bitcoin Pattern iOS app.

About Bitcoin Pattern

Bitcoin Pattern is an iOS app for crypto technical analysis — BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL charts, AI-assisted patterns, and multi-timeframe signals.

Disclaimer: AI-assisted content for informational purposes only. Not investment advice.
